text_excerpt: Media – Claire Fox Skip to content Claire Fox Menu Welcome About Claire Media Archive Inside the Lords Events Publications Reclaiming Democracy I STILL Find That Offensive! Media Rod Liddle, 11th April 2026 Thursday 16 April 2026 Saturday 11 April 2026 by Harley Richardson On Times Radio, Claire joined academic Lisa McKenzie and presenter Rod Liddle to review the stories of the week. They discussed the prospect of a peace deal in the Iran war, the legacy of the Artemis moon mission, the Premier League With Pride campaign, fuel crisis protests in Ireland, changes to eligibility for council housing, … Read more Categories Media Tags Rod Liddle , Times Radio Women’s rights one year on from the Supreme Court ruling Thursday 16 April 2026 Sunday 5 April 2026 by Harley Richardson Claire spoke to podcaster Penny Dee about the Supreme Court ruling on sex and single sex spaces – the gap between legal clarity and real world implementation, and why so many institutions still appear reluctant to act. Categories Media Tags Penny Dee Lords vote to scrap non-crime hate incidents Saturday 14 March 2026 Thursday 12 March 2026 by Harley Richardson Claire spoke to TalkTV‘s Kevin O’Sullivan about the defeat of an attempt to continue the recording of non-crime hate incidents. Categories Media Tags Kevin O'Sullivan , talkTV Free speech on life support Tuesday 17 March 2026 Thursday 12 March 2026 by Harley Richardson In conversation with Giuseppe Gracia of Schweizer Monat, the Swiss ‘magazine for doers and thinkers’, Claire discussed the fragile state of free speech in the UK, pressured by expanding hate and harm laws and a culture that treats offence as injury. Categories Media Tags Giuseppe Gracia , Schweizer Monat Claire on the DM-MI podcast Saturday 28 February 2026 Thursday 19 February 2026 by Harley Richardson Claire appeared on the DM-MI podcast, where you can find conversations around Technology & Business, as well as passionate discussions on a range of topics from Mixed Martial Arts to History, Geo-Politics and Current Affairs. Speaking with host Sukh Hayre, Claire shared her unconventional political journey from revolutionary left activism to the House of Lords, … Read more Categories Media Tags DM-MI , Sukh Hayre TalkTV, 17th February 2026 Wednesday 18 February 2026 Tuesday 17 February 2026 by Harley Richardson Claire spoke to Julia Hartley-Brewer about compensation for ‘wrongful’ phone seizures by border agents, the Filipino migrant who was given sex change treatments on the NHS, the offer of ‘US refuge’ for the British man who burnt a Koran, and revelations about Labour’s reaction to a corruption dossier. Categories Media Tags Julia Hartley-Brewer , talkTV The Cabal Play Thursday 19 February 2026 Tuesday 10 February 2026 by Harley Richardson On The Mike Graham Show, Baroness Claire Fox delivered a blistering assessment of Keir Starmer’s leadership crisis, Labour’s internal chaos, and a political class increasingly detached from the voters it claims to represent. Categories Media Tags Mike Graham Starmer and Mandelson Sunday 8 February 2026 Friday 6 February 2026 by Harley Richardson “I almost don’t want him to resign over this… there’s so many reasons why he’s not fit to govern…” Claire spoke to TalkTV‘s Julia Hartley-Brewer about Keir Starmer’s handling of the Peter Mandelson scandal. Categories Media Tags Julia Hartley-Brewer , talkTV Newsnight, 29th January 2026 Monday 2 February 2026 Thursday 29 January 2026 by Harley Richardson Claire was a guest on Newsnight. Watch the discussion on iPlayer here: China charmer Starmer?
